title: Secrets of the Silent Witch
sourceNotes: Single-cour 13-episode TV anime (2025) adapting light novel volumes 1-3. Manga ongoing (current ch. 32); per fan tracking, manga chapters 1-26 cover light novel volumes 1-2 and chapter 27 begins volume 3, matching the anime's coverage, though the manga has not yet caught up to the anime's volume-3 endpoint. Chapter boundaries for the volume 1/volume 2 split (~ch. 13) are estimated proportionally since no official per-chapter breakdown was found; treat as approximate.

mappings.arc: Bernie Jones & the Barrier Mage (Vol. 3, ongoing)
